description_long: This stereo sound system features a tall, rectangular tower design with a glossy black finish and a metallic front panel. The front face displays two prominent circular speaker drivers and a smaller tweeter at the top, all set within a silver-colored frame. The base is supported by a sturdy platform with metallic feet, providing stability and a modern aesthetic. The rear side includes a circular bass reflex port and a connection panel with multiple terminals for wiring. The sides are smooth and unadorned, emphasizing the sleek, monolithic appearance. The overall construction suggests a high-fidelity floor-standing speaker suitable for home or public audio environments.
description: A tall, glossy black floor-standing stereo speaker with a metallic front panel, visible speaker drivers, and a stable base. The rear features a bass port and connection terminals.
description_view_0: Front view showing two large speaker drivers, a tweeter, and a metallic faceplate.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the slim, smooth profile and the depth of the speaker.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a circular bass port and a connection panel with terminals at the bottom.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the unadorned, sleek side surface.
attribute_brand_logo: A small, square logo is visible at the bottom center of the front panel, featuring a white symbol or text on a black background.
attribute_speaker_grille_pattern: The speaker drivers are exposed without a traditional grille, showing smooth, circular cones and a metallic mounting plate.
